notes: Acted-as-LLM (Claude Opus 4.7 in-session) for POC + query generation.
First POC was too small (F2.if=4 vs seed=6); regenerated once with more of the cleanup body included so F2.if matched seed at 6.
Verifier-v1 strict-passed on the 2nd POC (F1.acq=0/F1.rel=0 because the error-return pattern doesn't acquire/release a resource).
compile_iters=1: query had one compile fix (LocalVariable.getDeclaringFunction -> getFunction). Counted as one repair iter.

Generic detector: looks for any function declaring a zero-init int that is returned at exit, plus a failure-guarded if (!x / x==0 / NULL / IS_ERR) whose then-branch is `goto LABEL` not assigning the err var first.
Does NOT mention _buggy/_fixed names; uses no hard-coded file/function names.
